snippets.title: 3D Flip Card
snippets.description: Card that flips in 3D on tap to reveal content on the back using Matrix4 transforms.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter card widget that flips in 3D on tap using Matrix4 transforms. Show different content on front and back. Smooth flip animation, no external packages.

snippets.title: Animated Bar Chart
snippets.description: Animated bar chart built from scratch with CustomPainter — no chart package.
snippets.prompt: Build an animated bar chart in Flutter using CustomPainter. Bars animate in from the bottom on load. No chart packages, pure Flutter.

snippets.title: Animated Bottom Navigation
snippets.description: Custom bottom navigation with animated indicator and icon scale effect.
snippets.prompt: Build a custom Flutter bottom navigation bar with an animated sliding indicator and icon scale effect when a tab is selected.

snippets.title: Animated Gradient Button
snippets.description: Button with a continuously shifting gradient background animation.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter button with a continuously animating gradient background that shifts colors in a loop using AnimationController.

snippets.title: Animated Number Counter
snippets.description: Numbers roll with a slot-machine effect when the value changes.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter number counter where digits change with a slot-machine roll effect. Smooth tween animation, no external packages.

snippets.title: Animated Stepper
snippets.description: Custom horizontal stepper with animated progress line, step icons, and labels.
snippets.prompt: Build a custom horizontal stepper widget in Flutter with an animated progress line connecting numbered step circles and labels.

snippets.title: Animated Success Dialog
snippets.description: Success dialog with animated checkmark drawn using CustomPainter.
snippets.prompt: Build an animated success dialog in Flutter. When shown, a checkmark draws itself using CustomPainter with a stroke animation.

snippets.title: Aurora Glass Card
snippets.description: Floating glass card with animated aurora blobs in purple, cyan and pink. BackdropFilter blur over morphing radial gradients.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter glassmorphism card with animated aurora blob effects in purple, cyan, and pink. Use BackdropFilter blur over morphing radial gradient blobs on a dark background.

snippets.title: Bouncing Dots Loader
snippets.description: Three dots that bounce sequentially using staggered animations.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter loading indicator with three dots that bounce sequentially using staggered AnimationController with offset delays.

snippets.title: Card Swipe Stack
snippets.description: Tinder-style swipeable card stack with drag, rotation, and dismiss animation.
snippets.prompt: Build a Tinder-style swipeable card stack in Flutter with drag gesture detection, card rotation based on drag offset, and dismiss animation.

snippets.title: Circular Countdown Timer
snippets.description: Animated circular progress timer with custom paint arc and color transitions.
snippets.prompt: Build a circular countdown timer in Flutter using CustomPainter to draw an arc that shrinks as time passes, with animated color transitions.

snippets.title: Floating Action Menu
snippets.description: Speed dial FAB that fans out sub-actions with staggered spring animations.
snippets.prompt: Build a speed dial FAB in Flutter that fans out sub-action buttons with staggered spring animations when pressed.

snippets.title: Glassmorphism Button
snippets.description: A stunning button with glass morphism effect using BackdropFilter and gradient border on a dark background.
snippets.prompt: Build a glassmorphism button in Flutter using BackdropFilter blur and a gradient border on a dark background. Frosted glass look with subtle shimmer.

snippets.title: Glassmorphism Card
snippets.description: Frosted glass card with gradient border and blur effect.
snippets.prompt: Build a frosted glass card in Flutter using BackdropFilter with a gradient border and blur effect on a dark background.

snippets.title: Gradient Text
snippets.description: Text with a linear gradient using ShaderMask — pure Flutter, no packages.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter widget that applies a linear gradient to text using ShaderMask. Multiple color stops, no external packages.

snippets.title: Liquid Progress Bar
snippets.description: Animated progress bar with a wave/liquid fill effect using CustomPainter.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter progress bar with an animated liquid wave fill effect using CustomPainter and sine wave math.

snippets.title: Morphing FAB
snippets.description: Floating action button that morphs into an expanded action panel with smooth animation.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter FAB that morphs into an expanded action panel with a smooth spring animation when pressed.

snippets.title: Neon Border Card
snippets.description: Card with an animated rotating neon gradient border using CustomPainter.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter card with an animated rotating neon gradient border using CustomPainter. Glowing neon effect on a dark background.

snippets.title: Neon Toggle Switch
snippets.description: Custom toggle switch with electric neon glow effect and smooth thumb animation.
snippets.prompt: Build a custom Flutter toggle switch with an electric neon glow effect and smooth animated thumb transition on toggle.

snippets.title: Neumorphic Button
snippets.description: Soft UI button with light and dark shadows creating a pressed-in depth effect.
snippets.prompt: Build a neumorphic button in Flutter with soft UI inner and outer shadows creating a pressed-in depth illusion on a neutral background.

snippets.title: Pin Code Input
snippets.description: OTP/PIN input with 6 boxes and auto-advance focus.
snippets.prompt: Build an OTP/PIN input widget in Flutter with 6 individual digit boxes, auto-advance focus on input, and backspace support.

snippets.title: Reorderable Drag List
snippets.description: Drag-to-reorder list using Flutter's built-in ReorderableListView.
snippets.prompt: Build a drag-to-reorder list in Flutter using ReorderableListView with visible drag handles and smooth reorder animation.

snippets.title: Shimmer Loading Card
snippets.description: Skeleton loading placeholder with shimmer animation — built from scratch, no shimmer package.
snippets.prompt: Build a skeleton loading placeholder card in Flutter with a shimmer sweep animation. No shimmer package, built from scratch.

snippets.title: Toast Notification
snippets.description: Animated slide-in toast notifications with icon, progress bar, and auto-dismiss.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter toast notification that slides in from the top, displays an icon and message, shows a countdown progress bar, and auto-dismisses.

snippets.title: Typewriter Animation
snippets.description: Typewriter effect with blinking cursor using AnimationController.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter typewriter text animation with a blinking cursor using AnimationController and character-by-character string reveal.

snippets.title: Wave Loading Animation
snippets.description: Animated wave using CustomPainter and sine wave math — no packages needed.
snippets.prompt: Build a Flutter wave loading animation using CustomPainter and sine wave math. Smooth looping wave, no external packages.

snippets.description: Widget fo Background
snippets.prompt: Widget als WorldGlobe
